corporate_actions.evidence: paid_in_capital increased from 2,424 tỷ to 2,741 tỷ VND (+317 tỷ)

HBC_2022_share_bridge.independent_method: midpoint(beginning, ending) from paid-in capital / par value
HBC_2022_share_bridge.tieout_rationale: 2.5% difference within 15% tolerance. Midpoint is approximation; actual weighted-average depends on issuance timing. Provider EPS-derived weighted uses provider-reported EPS (circular if used as oracle), but independent midpoint confirms same order of magnitude.
